arts.ttl: Liverpool Predicted Lineup vs. PSV Eindhoven: Champions League
arts.sum: Liverpool, with a win, would cap off a perfect Champions League league phase winning all eight of their matches.

arts.ttl: Liverpool unwilling to sell Nunez in January but expect summer bids
arts.sum: Liverpool have no intention of selling Darwin Nunez this month despite interest in the forward from Saudi Arabia. Al Nassr targeted a January deal to sign the striker, who has started just seven games in the Premier League so far this season. pic.twitter.com/aFtWUsCVLl — Darwin Núñez (@Darwinn99) January 19, 2025 He has scored six […] The post Liverpool unwilling to sell Nunez in January but expect summer bids first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Why Liverpool wonderkid Rio Ngumoha isn't in much-changed squad vs PSV
arts.sum: Young talents Trey Nyoni and Amara Nallo are included in Liverpool's squad to face PSV Eindhoven in the Champions League but fellow teenager Rio Ngumoha hasn't travelled

arts.ttl: Sacked ref David Coote tipped for football return despite cocaine shame and Liverpool rants
arts.sum: David Coote was sacked as a Premier League referee in December, but the 42-year-old has been tipped for a return to football in some capacity after opening up about his struggles

arts.ttl: PSV vs Liverpool Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Form Guide
arts.sum: Liverpool will be hoping conclude their UEFA Champions League league phase campaign with a 100% record when they travel to PSV on Wednesday evening. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our score ...

arts.ttl: Cody Gakpo told PSV reception to expect as ex-coach pays emotional tribute
arts.sum: Twan Scheepers played a key role in Cody Gakpo development at PSV Eindhoven - and the pair have remained close ever since - as the forward prepares to return to his boyhood club with Liverpool

arts.ttl: Why Neymar Jr’s move to Santos has huge implications for Liverpool
arts.sum: The football transfer merry-go-round continues to turn apace, and Neymar Jr’s move to Santos will almost certainly have huge implications for Liverpool. After an injury hit time in the Saudi Pro League, it was somewhat inevitable that the Brazilian’s time there would come to a swift end. arts.ttl: Liverpool owners FSG primed for £260m cash bonanza that easily smashes Mohamed Salah's Saudi contract offer
PSV Eindhoven vs. Liverpool: Should Arne Slot take Cody Gakpo risk in Champions League?
arts.sum: Liverpool have left several first-team players out of their squad for their Champions League clash against PSV Eindhoven, but starting Cody Gakpo could be a risk.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk Ballon d'Or: Why Liverpool defender could be best centre-back of all time, ahead of John Terry, Rio Ferdinand
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk is making a claim to be labelled the best centre-back in the history of the Premier League, as well as the history of football.
